title: 4 X CLIPPER MINI TUBE LIGHTER - SOLID - COLOUR DESIGN REFILLABLE LIGHTER FOR TEA & BBQ
description: Add a touch of style to your kitchen or outdoor cooking with this 4-piece set of refillable mini tube lighters from Smart Price. These lighters, available in a random assortment of colors, are perfect for tea, BBQ, or cooker use, featuring a cool design that makes them a great gift set. Made of plastic with a classic style, each lighter has a fuel type of butane and weighs 2 ounces. The set is a MECHANICAL LIGHTER type, and the product name is 'lighter'. Please note that the color of the lighters will be sent out randomly.
